svg.text: Enterprise Continuity Governance Board for Enterprise Security Continuit
Enterprise services, regions, dependencies, and continuity objectives under governance.
Governance authority for recovery approval, risk acceptance, escalation, and continuity decision control.
Executive coordination for continuity decision, approval, and stakeholder alignment.
Evidence package used for governance review, auditability, and post-recovery continuity reporting.
Define enterprise continuity scope and affecte
Evaluate risk, policy, and escalation authorit
Prepare evidence and executive recovery report
Complete governance review and audit trail.
